name: Emiliana Buchert
narrative: Teacher and 2nd Grade Teacher at Austin Achieve Public Schools, with prior IDEA Public Schools experience as 3rd Grade Math Teacher, 2nd Grade Team Leader/Math, Science, and Social Studies Teacher, 1st Grade Team Leader/Reading and Behavior Interventionist, and Special Education Teacher. BA in Special Education and Teaching from St. Edward's University; additional Special Education and Teaching study at Lone Star College. Fluent in English and Spanish with skills in translation, content development, instructional design, and strategic planning.
